name: Neon Barred Spiral Galaxy
description: You have been assigned the Neon Barred Spiral Galaxy — a grand design barred spiral crackling with electric neon blues, purples, and magentas. Its sharp, symmetrical bar structure is defined by intensely radiating electric gas and vibrant dust lanes that pulse with raw, neon energy, making it one of the most visually striking galaxies in the cosmos.

attributes.value: Sharp symmetrical bar of intensely radiating electric gas
